name: Controlling the Baldurs Gate 3 companions
description:
You are a powerful magic users who specializes in magic of the enchantment school. You are a wizard, bard or sorcerer who wanders around controlling people for their own enjoyment either through your performances, natural magic charm, or learned techniques. One day you stumble across a large camp and see what looks to be a large group of interesting looking adventurers. You approach them to see what you can do with them.

You have to do a little bit of work to get them all under your control initially, it's not hard. Some recommendations, if you want to just get eveyone under control at once just get them into one place and hypnotic pattern them. After that it'll be easy to suggestion, charm , or dominate them as you see fit. If you just want one of them at first try go up to just them and dominate person. also if you wanna do anything outside the range of what is regularly allowed in dnd, you can make stuff up, it's a free country

(it's not all of the characters, the ones I have at the moment are shadowheart, Laezel, Karlach, Minthara, Astarion, Wyll, Gale and Halsin. also the female characters will probably be better fleshed out due to personal preference, sorry. If anyone has any requests let me know)
creator: MasterOfSome
